3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "1.4.2" was found for current release 1.4.2. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (lib/synoChatRequests.js, [main.js](https://github.com/phoeluga/ioBroker.synochat/blob/master/main.js)). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.

6021.issue: [W6021] `## License` is not the last section in [README.md](https://github.com/phoeluga/ioBroker.synochat/blob/master/README.md). The license section should be the last section.

6025.issue: [E6025] [README.md](https://github.com/phoeluga/ioBroker.synochat/blob/master/README.md) must contain exactly one H1 heading, but found 2.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#62] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/phoeluga/ioBroker.synochat/issues/62)

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("npm", "github-actions") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/phoeluga/ioBroker.synochat/blob/master/package.json)

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/phoeluga/ioBroker.synochat/blob/master/package.json).
